headline: Cap-exempt university lane night. Tech People/Program + consulting lanes exhausted (all live roles 5+yr/Senior/no-sponsorship). 8 cap-exempt university packages built, audited, and rendered. ZERO auto-submitted — every role is Workday/PeopleAdmin requiring account creation, which Jamie must do herself.
why_no_auto_submit: All 8 viable roles tonight are cap-exempt universities on Workday or PeopleAdmin. These require creating an applicant account (email + password) before applying — a prohibited action Claude will not perform on Jamie's behalf even with permission. So all roles route to PACKAGE for Jamie's manual finish (~3 min each after account creation; Workday account is reusable across all postings at the same university).

applications.title: Academic Program Administrator, Career & Professional Development (DHBB)
applications.yoe_required: Bachelor's + 4 yrs (Master's preferred) — equivalency clears her
flags: ⭐ ALUMNI ADVANTAGE — her MS alma mater
On-site LA + occasional night/weekend events — confirm relocation

applications.title: Program Operations Specialist (Jackson School of International Studies)
flags: Mandarin + cross-cultural edge for East-Asia-focused division

applications.title: Program Coordinator, Bauer Leaders Academy
flags: BA Psych+Education + MS Org Psych nails preferred profile

applications.title: Program Coordinator, Center for Public & Nonprofit Leadership (McCourt)

flags: Strong event/program-ops + tool match (Google Workspace, Excel)

applications.title: Senior Cohort Program Manager (Pathmaker)
flags: No MA life-sciences industry knowledge (preferred, not required)

applications.title: Coordinator of Basic Needs Center

flags: STRETCH/PIVOT — no direct-service advising in higher ed (disclosed honestly in cover)

applications.title: Program Coordinator, Leadership Programs (Johnson GSM)
applications.yoe_required: Associate + 4-6 yrs OR equivalency (her MS+BA+~3yr clears via equivalency)
flags: 🔴 JD EXPLICITLY STATES 'Visa sponsorship is not available for this position' — despite Cornell being cap-exempt. VERIFY with recruiter Freddie Salley (fls55@cornell.edu) BEFORE applying.
Strong content fit but sponsorship is the open question
